claim_boundary: Preproduction technical rejection and supersession only; no training or model-quality result.
rejection_reasons: The launcher redirected stdout to $SHARED_DIR/MATERIALIZATION_TERMINAL.json before creating $SHARED_DIR, so the shell would fail with ENOENT before Python materialization started.
mkdir -p of only the parent did not provide an atomic same-fold exact-once lock.
The training launcher could proceed while the bound preregistration explicitly had training_authorized=false and did not bind a completed V1.3 preflight receipt plus independent approval receipt.
Validation used bash syntax only and lacked a real temporary-directory launcher runtime smoke covering directory creation and redirection.
